title: Big Globe - Remove Obelisk
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-remove-obelisk)

This mod/datapack removes the Obelisk of [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe), which makes it no longer generated in the world

Generating this structure requires a high load (CPU) and eliminate it, it can have a positive impact

### **Example Before:**
![o](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b02a4e3c0099cd96fcae9793e7c7d8c9e87f0657_0.webp)

### **Example After:**
![p](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e540ceda8319617286e7391ca63032bfd2da391_0.webp)
